title: elaphoglossum deorsum
intro: Elaphoglossum deorsum, also known as the "Deersong Fern" or "Elaphoglossum fern," is a species of epiphytic fern native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum deorsum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Elaphoglossum deorsum is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by infusing the leaves in hot water, which can also be used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
